segment.source: Renders a heading and subheadline above a two- or three-column grid of manually curated post teasers, each with image, category label, meta line (date or read time), linked title, and rich-text excerpt. Use it for: 'latest from the blog' sections, news previews, editorial highlights, article roundups on home or overview pages. Prefer 'Article Grid' for text-first article cards, 'Case Study Grid' for customer success stories.
